response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a full-stack engineer across multiple industries, with 11+ years in senior roles. His background includes deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS, along with secondary skills in Kotlin/Java and AI agent infrastructure. His contributions to scalable systems (e.g., handling millions of requests/sec) and open-source projects like GISCollective highlight his architectural and problem-solving abilities. While his current role emphasizes AI-agent tools, his prior work aligns closely with the required stack and responsibilities.
strengths: 11+ years of senior full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript/Node.js and modern frontend frameworks (React, Ember.js)
Proven track record in scaling high-performance systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec) and optimizing pricing strategies using AWS/CDK and MongoDB
Diverse technical expertise across backend (DLang, Java, C++), frontend, DevOps (Docker, Kubernetes), and AI-agent infrastructure, demonstrating adaptability to the required stack
concerns: Limited visible experience with Nest.js, Vitest, and PostgreSQL/MySQL (primary stack requirements), though his Node.js and testing background suggests adaptability
More recent work focuses on AI-agent infrastructure rather than traditional enterprise tooling, though his prior roles show alignment with user-driven development
Primary stack experience is concentrated in TypeScript/Node.js/React, with less emphasis on Kotlin/Java (secondary stack) in recent roles

key_factors.factor: Experience with scalable systems and cloud platforms (AWS)
Depth in backend/frontend development (architectural and UX focus)
